name: cursor-cli-source-security-check-loop
title: cursor-cli-source-security-check-loop
description: Run deterministic source-code security checks, derive harness-style focus areas, triage and adversarially verify findings with Cursor CLI, delegate blocking fixes, and rescan until verified high and medium findings are resolved.
